category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers entering the Australian market.

target_market_label.zh: 澳大利亚（RCM / EESS / ACMA / GEMS）

title.en: China-to-Australia LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入澳大利亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入澳洲：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Australian RCM electrical safety and EESS obligations, ACMA EMC requirements, GEMS/MEPS rules for in-scope LED lamps, and AS/NZS 62471 photobiological safety expectations versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与澳大利亚 RCM 电气安全及 EESS 义务、ACMA EMC 要求、适用 LED 灯的 GEMS/MEPS 规则及 AS/NZS 62471 光生物安全要求差距对照，与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與澳洲 RCM 電氣安全及 EESS 義務、ACMA EMC 要求、適用 LED 燈的 GEMS/MEPS 規則及 AS/NZS 62471 光生物安全要求差距對照，與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, electrical safety approval, EMC approval, GEMS registration decision, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Australian federal, state and territory electrical safety laws, EESS rules, ACMA instruments, GEMS determinations, registration status, and applicable AS/NZS standards with qualified professionals before shipment or market supply.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、电气安全批准、EMC 批准、GEMS 注册结论、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或供应市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行澳大利亚联邦、州和领地电气安全法律、EESS 规则、ACMA 法规文件、GEMS 决定、注册状态及适用 AS/NZS 标准。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、電氣安全批准、EMC 批准、GEMS 註冊結論、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或供應市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行澳洲聯邦、州和領地電氣安全法律、EESS 規則、ACMA 法規文件、GEMS 決定、註冊狀態及適用 AS/NZS 標準。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer entering Australia must have an Australian responsible supplier/importer, meet electrical safety obligations under state and territory law and the EESS framework, apply the RCM where required, build a compliance folder using AS/NZS 60598 evidence for luminaires and relevant LED driver standards, satisfy ACMA EMC obligations with AS/NZS CISPR 15 evidence for lighting equipment, register and meet MEPS/packaging requirements for in-scope LED lamps under the Greenhouse and Energy Minimum Standards (LED Lamps) Determination 2025, and address photobiological safety using AS/NZS 62471 where applicable. Chinese CCC or GB test reports are useful technical inputs but do not by themselves satisfy Australian RCM, ACMA, EESS, or GEMS pathways.
answer_first.zh: 进入澳大利亚市场的中国 LED 灯具制造商须具备澳大利亚责任供应商/进口商，满足州和领地电气安全法律及 EESS 框架义务，在要求时加贴 RCM，使用 AS/NZS 60598 灯具证据及相关 LED 驱动标准建立合规文件夹，按 AS/NZS CISPR 15 证据满足 ACMA 对照明设备的 EMC 义务，并对纳入范围的 LED 灯依据《2025 年温室气体与能源最低标准（LED 灯）决定》完成注册、满足 MEPS 和包装信息要求，同时在适用时按 AS/NZS 62471 处理光生物安全。中国 CCC 或 GB 检测报告可作为技术输入，但本身不满足澳大利亚 RCM、ACMA、EESS 或 GEMS 路径。
answer_first.zht: 進入澳洲市場的中國 LED 燈具製造商須具備澳洲責任供應商/進口商，滿足州和領地電氣安全法律及 EESS 框架義務，在要求時加貼 RCM，使用 AS/NZS 60598 燈具證據及相關 LED 驅動標準建立合規文件夾，按 AS/NZS CISPR 15 證據滿足 ACMA 對照明設備的 EMC 義務，並對納入範圍的 LED 燈依據《2025 年溫室氣體與能源最低標準（LED 燈）決定》完成註冊、滿足 MEPS 和包裝資訊要求，同時在適用時按 AS/NZS 62471 處理光生物安全。中國 CCC 或 GB 檢測報告可作為技術輸入，但本身不滿足澳洲 RCM、ACMA、EESS 或 GEMS 路徑。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official Australian regulator, Federal Register of Legislation, EESS, ACMA, Energy Rating / GEMS Regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs and non-official secondary sources are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. EESS equipment levels, ACMA EMC notices, GEMS LED lamp scope dates, MEPS thresholds, and photobiological hazard test triggers must be re-verified against current official instruments on each review cycle.
